TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_’_tayal, title = ’_tayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/’_tayal} }

S.FORM: 'tayal hya' ga mtnaq kwara' kwara' nyux maki' rhzyal Taiwan qani ka gluw gluw sawn minqwas biru' maha "Nantaw Mincuw'". ru spzyang whci' balay nyux ki'an rhzyal maki' sa rgyax na Taiwan qaniy. 'tayal hya' ga gluw squliq nakinraral laha' yalaw gi kya Gaga' na mutuw kmut tunux ru sisay maha niwan laha' qu mutuw galan pspngan maha squliq balay kinraral qu laha qaniy. cyux maki' squ pzyang balay wagiq balay qsahuy rgrgyax Taiwan qaniy, aring kya Tose' Taycyuw, ruw siy qaysiy mucing Karingkoo mkura' tay mkraya' Taiwan, sisay spzyang balay whci' rhzyal naha' iy slpuw sa squliq pkaki' rgyax nanak qu lpgun. Kahul squ kay' na senmung pkingkyuw sa kinhuzyan nnanu' na "Gakusiya'" ga, aring sqani pllpgun lga, nanu' squ ki'a wayal hmzinas zmagal syan msyaw lga, rima' mqyanux sqani qu 'tayal qaniy la, nanu' yasa qu kin'tan naha' kya puqing llyung na llyung maymutang qu kni'an pinsalan naha', kawas qasa hya' lga ki'a wal sa zyuwaw na sazing syan kawas squ cyugal syan kawas lma. Rhzyal cyux naha' ki'an kahul squ knita' nqu minlahang rhzyal qaniy ga cyux mgazyang maki' squ lnglingay na Cyu'o Sammyaku ru lnglingay na rgyax papak waqa', yaqu mnayang squ tmqsinuw qu sqyanux naha'. squliq na Ptasan kin ini' ptnaq naha' sa squliq bzinah hya' ga, kya patas rqyas naha'. yalaw giy watal swalan na Sexu' smbuci' maha qutux nanak na gluw qu Truku' maha gluw na Truku' lalu' naha' la. aw' ga skahul sa hngzyang na kkayal naha' ga, pzyux balay qu mtnaq na' kay' naha' hya'. Kinkhmauy na squliq naha' tayhuk sa kawas tay kbhul ru zmagal(2016kawas na amirika') pinlpuw na Sexu' ga wayal tayhuk mtzyu' mang cyugal syan hi' naha' la. kkayal sa kay' na 'tayal squ squliq atu' na skahul squ ptbcyan lalu' na minqyanux babaw cinbwanan qaniy ga, minqyanux na baq 'msuna' squ mnqyanux na ini' 'suna', baq 'msuna' hya' ga nanu' yaqu Squliq ru qqsinuw, qqbhniq, ru qlqulih, ru kaykuwi', nanu' minkahul kya pintbcyan na lalu' na squliq hya', ini' ptnaq qsinuw squ Squliq. nanu' yasa qu Squliq hya' ga lalu' na binkgan pinbcyan na kwara' minqyanux qaniy hya'. nanu' ktan su' ka mutuw kmayal qu Buksi' sraral maha "ita' ka squliq nyux mqyanux sa babaw cinnwanan qaniy ga, ini' ta' siy pinhmut mqyanux, gi ini' ta' ptnaq sa qqsinuw ka ini' qbaq sa sayux qu qqsinuw hya'." nanu' qu sawn lalu' na 'tayal hya' 'tayal hya' ga, pinbcyan lalu' nqu mtnaq gaga' ru mtnaq la kay' kkayal naha'. ini' ptnaq gaga' ru ini' ptnaq la kay' lga Paris naha' qasa hya' la. 'tayal balay maha qu kay' qasa hya' ga, spzyang balay baq mqyanux na 'tayal maha qu kay' niya' balay. nanu' mbhuzyaw kya qu squliq lru, siy ptbuci' nanak qu ppgluw krayryax lga, maki' lqu pintbcyan lalu' nqu qutux qutux gluw na lahuy na squliq la, nanu' kahul squ kinki'an naha' qu 'ringan smlalu' sa lalu' na qutux qutux lahuy na squliq la, nanu' maki' kya lqu sawn maha' 'tayal, ru Baybuzyuq, tu Bunun, ru Cow, ru Saw, ru Rukay, ru Paiwan, ru Ta'u', ru Amis qani la. kahul ta' inu' musa' baqun balay mita' qu kin-ini' ptnaq na Squliq squ 'tayal qaniy? ktan su' kya qu squliq p'agal 'ina' ga, mutuw naha' pqutan maha "kahul inu' qu ina' su'? 'tayal ini' ga Plmukan? ini' ga bunun?", ungat ana qutux mutuw maqut maha "Plmukan ini' ga Squliq? hya' kiy!", nanu' yasa qu baqun sqani maha lalu' na 'tayal hya' ga lalu' na pinbcyan na qutux quutx luhing gluw na squliq qasa hya'. 'tayal hya' ga lalu' na krahu' squ binkgan pinbcyan na Squliq qasa hya'. hmswa' qu pins'ulah nqu gluw na 'tayal squ gluw na sziq qaniy kahul sa Gaga' naha' ru kay' naha' mita' ga, 'tayal squ Seziq qaniy mita' ga, nanu' qu s'uciy naha muci qaniy ga, minqutux kwara maha qu qnbaq kwara' nqu 'tayal kila sziq qani hya, kkayal qani uzi ga, aring sraral na' ga, mtnaq kwara' knita' naha' qani hiya'. aring knaki' sqani na Gipun na' ga, yalaw gi spzyang naha' baqun maha kya qu squliq na ptasan rqyas ga nanu' yaqu 'tayal kya Pyasan ha, nanu' skahul naha' squ kay' naha' nanak maha sami hya' ga 'tayal sami maha ru, nanu' aring kya qu kya lqu lalu' na 'tayal ka Ptasan rqyas qaniy la. nanu' yasa lruw mzyup kya sa kska' balay na Taiwan qu Gipun lga, ktan naha' kya maha kya uzi qu gluw na Se'ediq la, ga aki' maki' qu sawn binkgan pinbcyan na gluw squliq maki' Taiwan ru spgluw naha' sa Tayal Zoku qu lalu' na Se'ediq la, ga nanu' qu 'tayal balay hya' lga, Taiyal yazoku sawn miru' na Gakusya' misu qani hya'. spzyang hngzyangan lalu' na 'tayalzoku miru' qu Gipun qaniy ga, balay ga 'tayal maha qu kay' ga, sbahun naha' maha Ataiyaru' miru, ga Se'ediq hya' lga Setaka' sawn naha' miru' la, balay ga 'tayal ga ǝ-ta-yal maha qu balay, ru Se'ediq hiya' lga sǝ-e-diq maha qu balay na hngzyang naha' hiya', mwah squ Thayluw qaniy lga, Tai-ya-cu' sawn naha' miru' qu 'tayal hya' ru Sai-tǝ-kǝ sawn naha' miru' qu Se'ediq hya' la. kahul inu' qu sinllwan maha "Zoku" qaniy balay ga lalu' na sawn maha "Zoku" qani ga, ana maha 'tayal ini' ga se'ediq qani gaiyat mnaki' qu kkayal qaniy hya'. nanu' yaqu aki' naha' sr'tun kwara' qu ulah na 'tayal qani ru skbalay naha' sa binkgan pinbcyan na lalu' na qitix gluw, nanu' yasa qu sikiy psulung sa binkgan pinbcyan nqu maha maha nanu' qu pincgwi'an na qutux gluw na Bunmesyakay, kwara' qu sawn maha ubuy na binkgan pinbcyan qaniy ga sikiy kya lalu' kwara' qutux qutux pintbcyan, nanu' yaniy qu sinllwan naha' lalu' na "Zoku" qaniy. iy skayal ta' kay' na 'tayal ga musa' yaquw sawn maha "ulah na lalu' binkgan pinbcyan" maha qu imi' niya', ga bali mutuw skayal krayryax qu kay' qnaiy hya', yalaw gi binkgan na oinbcyan qaniy hya' ga kahul squ sinllwan na Bunmesyakay qu lalu' qaniy hya', saw su' iyal qu lalu' na "yazu'" uzi ga sni' naha' squ maha mtnaq sa puqin lalu' qu ulah niya' ka mtnaq lalu' nasa lga, yasa qu syan naha' maha "yazu'" qani la. ga bali ta' ini' baqiy kwara' maha iyat mnaki' trayryax sraral qu sinllwan qani hya. Sawn ta' nanu' hmkangi' qu lalu' sraral na gluw nqu Ptasan rqyas qaniy Skahul ta'squ sinllwan nanak na ''tayal qu sawn maha squliq qani hya' ga, balay balay hya' qu sawn na gluw 'tayal maha Squliq" squ sawn na gluw na s'ziq maha "se'ediq" ini' ga sawn naha' "sziq" ga mtnaq kwara'maha yasa qu sawn ta' pinbcyan ta' squ Squliq minqyanux cinbwanan qaniy. Gaga' hya' lga mtnaq qutux lalu' na binkagan pinbcyan kwara qaniy hya'. yalaw gi bali mnaki' biru' naha' miru' sraral rwa! musa' nanak yaqu skahul sa mtnaq Gaga' naha' ru yaqu musa' 'llaw iyal baqun mita' sa rqyas ru inrkyasan naha', aw'ru kkayal sa kay' naha' musa' hmkangi' squ sisay pinsqtuxan na lalu' naha' sraral la, nanu' skahul sa wayal skal qani pspung lga, musa' nanak yaqu maha "Ptasan Zoku" qu musa' m'uluw kya qu lalu' naha' la. pinslabang mqyanux na gluw na Ptasan aring sa minqutux sraral (ptasan族群從ptasan時代的發展) pinslabang kahul na ptasan sraral hya' ga aring squ sungus na mbhuzyaw qu squliq niya' ru msgagay mshzi' tay bbzinah na rhzyal, kahul squ mshzi' lru m'sazing na ulah ka gluw na 'tayal squ gluw na sziq qaniy la. babaw niya' lawzi lga, nanu' qu sazing ulan nqu Ptasan ka 'tayalru sziq qaniy ga, nyux mtbuci' msinna cyugal uziy qu ulah naha' nanak uziy la. ru taqu gluw na 'tayal hya' lga, mslabang mqyanux lawziy lru nyux msincyugal uziy qu pinbcyan na kkayal kay' naha' misuw qaniy la, nanu' gluw na Mkmuyaw, ru gluw na Mesali', ru gluw na Kinhakulcyugal ini' ptnaq ubuy na kkayal kay' qaniy. nanu' qu ulah na sziq uziy ga, mslabang mqyanux uziy lru nyux msincyugal uziy qu pinbcyan na kkayal kay' naha' misuw qaniy uziy la, nanu' yaqu gluw na Truku', ru gluw na towda', ru yaqu gluw na Tkdaya' cyugal ini' ptnaq pinbcyan kkayal na kay' naha' qaniy. yalaw gi wayal swalan na Sexu' ulah na sziq maha' ptbuci' nanak mg qutux nanak na Zoku' lruw, iyat pkaki' squ musa' maku' pngaygay pinqzyu' babaw niya' qu ulah naha' hya' la.

'tayal hya' ga mtnaq kwara' kwara' nyux maki' rhzyal Taiwan qani ka gluw gluw sawn minqwas biru' maha "Nantaw Mincuw'". ru spzyang whci' balay nyux ki'an rhzyal maki' sa rgyax na Taiwan qaniy. 'tayal hya' ga gluw squliq nakinraral laha' yalaw gi kya Gaga' na mutuw kmut tunux ru sisay maha niwan laha' qu mutuw galan pspngan maha squliq balay kinraral qu laha qaniy. cyux maki' squ pzyang balay wagiq balay qsahuy rgrgyax Taiwan qaniy, aring kya Tose' Taycyuw, ruw siy qaysiy mucing Karingkoo mkura' tay mkraya' Taiwan, sisay spzyang balay whci' rhzyal naha' iy slpuw sa squliq pkaki' rgyax nanak qu lpgun. Kahul squ kay' na senmung pkingkyuw sa kinhuzyan nnanu' na "Gakusiya'" ga, aring sqani pllpgun lga, nanu' squ ki'a wayal hmzinas zmagal syan msyaw lga, rima' mqyanux sqani qu 'tayal qaniy la, nanu' yasa qu kin'tan naha' kya puqing llyung na llyung maymutang qu kni'an pinsalan naha', kawas qasa hya' lga ki'a wal sa zyuwaw na sazing syan kawas squ cyugal syan kawas lma. Rhzyal cyux naha' ki'an kahul squ knita' nqu minlahang rhzyal qaniy ga cyux mgazyang maki' squ lnglingay na Cyu'o Sammyaku ru lnglingay na rgyax papak waqa', yaqu mnayang squ tmqsinuw qu sqyanux naha'. squliq na Ptasan kin ini' ptnaq naha' sa squliq bzinah hya' ga, kya patas rqyas naha'. yalaw giy watal swalan na Sexu' smbuci' maha qutux nanak na gluw qu Truku' maha gluw na Truku' lalu' naha' la. aw' ga skahul sa hngzyang na kkayal naha' ga, pzyux balay qu mtnaq na' kay' naha' hya'. Kinkhmauy na squliq naha' tayhuk sa kawas tay kbhul ru zmagal(2016kawas na amirika') pinlpuw na Sexu' ga wayal tayhuk mtzyu' mang cyugal syan hi' naha' la. kkayal sa kay' na 'tayal squ squliq atu' na skahul squ ptbcyan lalu' na minqyanux babaw cinbwanan qaniy ga, minqyanux na baq 'msuna' squ mnqyanux na ini' 'suna', baq 'msuna' hya' ga nanu' yaqu Squliq ru qqsinuw, qqbhniq, ru qlqulih, ru kaykuwi', nanu' minkahul kya pintbcyan na lalu' na squliq hya', ini' ptnaq qsinuw squ Squliq. nanu' yasa qu Squliq hya' ga lalu' na binkgan pinbcyan na kwara' minqyanux qaniy hya'. nanu' ktan su' ka mutuw kmayal qu Buksi' sraral maha "ita' ka squliq nyux mqyanux sa babaw cinnwanan qaniy ga, ini' ta' siy pinhmut mqyanux, gi ini' ta' ptnaq sa qqsinuw ka ini' qbaq sa sayux qu qqsinuw hya'." nanu' qu sawn lalu' na 'tayal hya' 'tayal hya' ga, pinbcyan lalu' nqu mtnaq gaga' ru mtnaq la kay' kkayal naha'. ini' ptnaq gaga' ru ini' ptnaq la kay' lga Paris naha' qasa hya' la. 'tayal balay maha qu kay' qasa hya' ga, spzyang balay baq mqyanux na 'tayal maha qu kay' niya' balay. nanu' mbhuzyaw kya qu squliq lru, siy ptbuci' nanak qu ppgluw krayryax lga, maki' lqu pintbcyan lalu' nqu qutux qutux gluw na lahuy na squliq la, nanu' kahul squ kinki'an naha' qu 'ringan smlalu' sa lalu' na qutux qutux lahuy na squliq la, nanu' maki' kya lqu sawn maha' 'tayal, ru Baybuzyuq, tu Bunun, ru Cow, ru Saw, ru Rukay, ru Paiwan, ru Ta'u', ru Amis qani la. kahul ta' inu' musa' baqun balay mita' qu kin-ini' ptnaq na Squliq squ 'tayal qaniy? ktan su' kya qu squliq p'agal 'ina' ga, mutuw naha' pqutan maha "kahul inu' qu ina' su'? 'tayal ini' ga Plmukan? ini' ga bunun?", ungat ana qutux mutuw maqut maha "Plmukan ini' ga Squliq? hya' kiy!", nanu' yasa qu baqun sqani maha lalu' na 'tayal hya' ga lalu' na pinbcyan na qutux quutx luhing gluw na squliq qasa hya'. 'tayal hya' ga lalu' na krahu' squ binkgan pinbcyan na Squliq qasa hya'. hmswa' qu pins'ulah nqu gluw na 'tayal squ gluw na sziq qaniy kahul sa Gaga' naha' ru kay' naha' mita' ga, 'tayal squ Seziq qaniy mita' ga, nanu' qu s'uciy naha muci qaniy ga, minqutux kwara maha qu qnbaq kwara' nqu 'tayal kila sziq qani hya, kkayal qani uzi ga, aring sraral na' ga, mtnaq kwara' knita' naha' qani hiya'. aring knaki' sqani na Gipun na' ga, yalaw gi spzyang naha' baqun maha kya qu squliq na ptasan rqyas ga nanu' yaqu 'tayal kya Pyasan ha, nanu' skahul naha' squ kay' naha' nanak maha sami hya' ga 'tayal sami maha ru, nanu' aring kya qu kya lqu lalu' na 'tayal ka Ptasan rqyas qaniy la. nanu' yasa lruw mzyup kya sa kska' balay na Taiwan qu Gipun lga, ktan naha' kya maha kya uzi qu gluw na Se'ediq la, ga aki' maki' qu sawn binkgan pinbcyan na gluw squliq maki' Taiwan ru spgluw naha' sa Tayal Zoku qu lalu' na Se'ediq la, ga nanu' qu 'tayal balay hya' lga, Taiyal yazoku sawn miru' na Gakusya' misu qani hya'. spzyang hngzyangan lalu' na 'tayalzoku miru' qu Gipun qaniy ga, balay ga 'tayal maha qu kay' ga, sbahun naha' maha Ataiyaru' miru, ga Se'ediq hya' lga Setaka' sawn naha' miru' la, balay ga 'tayal ga ǝ-ta-yal maha qu balay, ru Se'ediq hiya' lga sǝ-e-diq maha qu balay na hngzyang naha' hiya', mwah squ Thayluw qaniy lga, Tai-ya-cu' sawn naha' miru' qu 'tayal hya' ru Sai-tǝ-kǝ sawn naha' miru' qu Se'ediq hya' la. kahul inu' qu sinllwan maha "Zoku" qaniy balay ga lalu' na sawn maha "Zoku" qani ga, ana maha 'tayal ini' ga se'ediq qani gaiyat mnaki' qu kkayal qaniy hya'. nanu' yaqu aki' naha' sr'tun kwara' qu ulah na 'tayal qani ru skbalay naha' sa binkgan pinbcyan na lalu' na qitix gluw, nanu' yasa qu sikiy psulung sa binkgan pinbcyan nqu maha maha nanu' qu pincgwi'an na qutux gluw na Bunmesyakay, kwara' qu sawn maha ubuy na binkgan pinbcyan qaniy ga sikiy kya lalu' kwara' qutux qutux pintbcyan, nanu' yaniy qu sinllwan naha' lalu' na "Zoku" qaniy. iy skayal ta' kay' na 'tayal ga musa' yaquw sawn maha "ulah na lalu' binkgan pinbcyan" maha qu imi' niya', ga bali mutuw skayal krayryax qu kay' qnaiy hya', yalaw gi binkgan na oinbcyan qaniy hya' ga kahul squ sinllwan na Bunmesyakay qu lalu' qaniy hya', saw su' iyal qu lalu' na "yazu'" uzi ga sni' naha' squ maha mtnaq sa puqin lalu' qu ulah niya' ka mtnaq lalu' nasa lga, yasa qu syan naha' maha "yazu'" qani la. ga bali ta' ini' baqiy kwara' maha iyat mnaki' trayryax sraral qu sinllwan qani hya. Sawn ta' nanu' hmkangi' qu lalu' sraral na gluw nqu Ptasan rqyas qaniy Skahul ta'squ sinllwan nanak na ''tayal qu sawn maha squliq qani hya' ga, balay balay hya' qu sawn na gluw 'tayal maha Squliq" squ sawn na gluw na s'ziq maha "se'ediq" ini' ga sawn naha' "sziq" ga mtnaq kwara'maha yasa qu sawn ta' pinbcyan ta' squ Squliq minqyanux cinbwanan qaniy. Gaga' hya' lga mtnaq qutux lalu' na binkagan pinbcyan kwara qaniy hya'. yalaw gi bali mnaki' biru' naha' miru' sraral rwa! musa' nanak yaqu skahul sa mtnaq Gaga' naha' ru yaqu musa' 'llaw iyal baqun mita' sa rqyas ru inrkyasan naha', aw'ru kkayal sa kay' naha' musa' hmkangi' squ sisay pinsqtuxan na lalu' naha' sraral la, nanu' skahul sa wayal skal qani pspung lga, musa' nanak yaqu maha "Ptasan Zoku" qu musa' m'uluw kya qu lalu' naha' la. pinslabang mqyanux na gluw na Ptasan aring sa minqutux sraral (ptasan族群從ptasan時代的發展) pinslabang kahul na ptasan sraral hya' ga aring squ sungus na mbhuzyaw qu squliq niya' ru msgagay mshzi' tay bbzinah na rhzyal, kahul squ mshzi' lru m'sazing na ulah ka gluw na 'tayal squ gluw na sziq qaniy la. babaw niya' lawzi lga, nanu' qu sazing ulan nqu Ptasan ka 'tayalru sziq qaniy ga, nyux mtbuci' msinna cyugal uziy qu ulah naha' nanak uziy la. ru taqu gluw na 'tayal hya' lga, mslabang mqyanux lawziy lru nyux msincyugal uziy qu pinbcyan na kkayal kay' naha' misuw qaniy la, nanu' gluw na Mkmuyaw, ru gluw na Mesali', ru gluw na Kinhakulcyugal ini' ptnaq ubuy na kkayal kay' qaniy. nanu' qu ulah na sziq uziy ga, mslabang mqyanux uziy lru nyux msincyugal uziy qu pinbcyan na kkayal kay' naha' misuw qaniy uziy la, nanu' yaqu gluw na Truku', ru gluw na towda', ru yaqu gluw na Tkdaya' cyugal ini' ptnaq pinbcyan kkayal na kay' naha' qaniy. yalaw gi wayal swalan na Sexu' ulah na sziq maha' ptbuci' nanak mg qutux nanak na Zoku' lruw, iyat pkaki' squ musa' maku' pngaygay pinqzyu' babaw niya' qu ulah naha' hya' la.
S.PHON: ʔtajal ħjaʔ ɣa mtnaq kwaraʔ kwaraʔ njux makiʔ rħzjal taiwan qani ka ɣluw ɣluw s~ɕawn minqwas~ɕ βiruʔ maħa "nantaw minʦ~ʨuwʔ". ru s~ɕpzjaŋ wħʦ~ʨiʔ βalaj njux kiʔan rħzjal makiʔ s~ɕa rɣjax na taiwan qanij. ʔtajal ħjaʔ ɣa ɣluw s~ɕquliq nakinraral laħaʔ jalaw ɣi kja ɣaɣaʔ na mutuw kmut tunux ru s~ɕis~ɕaj maħa niwan laħaʔ qu mutuw ɣalan ps~ɕpŋan maħa s~ɕquliq βalaj kinraral qu laħa qanij. ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ s~ɕqu pzjaŋ βalaj waɣiq βalaj qs~ɕaħuj rɣrɣjax taiwan qanij, ariŋ kja tos~ɕeʔ tajʦ~ʨjuw, ruw s~ɕij qajs~ɕij muʦ~ʨiŋ kariŋkoo mkuraʔ taj mkrajaʔ taiwan, s~ɕis~ɕaj s~ɕpzjaŋ βalaj wħʦ~ʨiʔ rħzjal naħaʔ ij s~ɕlpuw s~ɕa s~ɕquliq pkakiʔ rɣjax nanak qu lpɣun. kaħul s~ɕqu kajʔ na s~ɕenmuŋ pkiŋkjuw s~ɕa kinħuzjan nnanuʔ na "ɣakus~ɕijaʔ" ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqani pllpɣun lɣa, nanuʔ s~ɕqu kiʔa wajal ħmzinas~ɕ zmaɣal s~ɕjan ms~ɕjaw lɣa, rimaʔ mqjanux s~ɕqani qu ʔtajal qanij la, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu kinʔtan naħaʔ kja puqiŋ lljuŋ na lljuŋ majmutaŋ qu kniʔan pins~ɕalan naħaʔ, kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ lɣa kiʔa wal s~ɕa zjuwaw na s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕjan kawas~ɕ s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕjan kawas~ɕ lma. rħzjal ʦ~ʨjux naħaʔ kiʔan kaħul s~ɕqu knitaʔ nqu minlaħaŋ rħzjal qanij ɣa ʦ~ʨjux mɣazjaŋ makiʔ s~ɕqu lŋliŋaj na ʦ~ʨjuʔo s~ɕammjaku ru lŋliŋaj na rɣjax papak waqaʔ, jaqu mnajaŋ s~ɕqu tmqs~ɕinuw qu s~ɕqjanux naħaʔ. s~ɕquliq na ptas~ɕan kin iniʔ ptnaq naħaʔ s~ɕa s~ɕquliq βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa, kja patas~ɕ rqjas~ɕ naħaʔ. jalaw ɣij watal s~ɕwalan na s~ɕexuʔ s~ɕmβuʦ~ʨiʔ maħa qutux nanak na ɣluw qu trukuʔ maħa ɣluw na trukuʔ laluʔ naħaʔ la. awʔ ɣa s~ɕkaħul s~ɕa ħŋzjaŋ na kkajal naħaʔ ɣa, pzjux βalaj qu mtnaq naʔ kajʔ naħaʔ ħjaʔ. kinkħmauj na s~ɕquliq naħaʔ tajħuk s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj kβħul ru zmaɣal(****kawas~ɕ na amirikaʔ) pinlpuw na s~ɕexuʔ ɣa wajal tajħuk mtzjuʔ maŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕjan ħiʔ naħaʔ la. kkajal s~ɕa kajʔ na ʔtajal s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq atuʔ na s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu ptβʦ~ʨjan laluʔ na minqjanux βaβaw ʦ~ʨinβwanan qanij ɣa, minqjanux na βaq ʔms~ɕunaʔ s~ɕqu mnqjanux na iniʔ ʔs~ɕunaʔ, βaq ʔms~ɕunaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa nanuʔ jaqu s~ɕquliq ru qqs~ɕinuw, qqβħniq, ru qlquliħ, ru kajkuwiʔ, nanuʔ minkaħul kja pintβʦ~ʨjan na laluʔ na s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ, iniʔ ptnaq qs~ɕinuw s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq. nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa laluʔ na βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan na kwaraʔ minqjanux qanij ħjaʔ. nanuʔ ktan s~ɕuʔ ka mutuw kmajal qu βuks~ɕiʔ s~ɕraral maħa "itaʔ ka s~ɕquliq njux mqjanux s~ɕa βaβaw ʦ~ʨinnwanan qanij ɣa, iniʔ taʔ s~ɕij pinħmut mqjanux, ɣi iniʔ taʔ ptnaq s~ɕa qqs~ɕinuw ka iniʔ qβaq s~ɕa s~ɕajux qu qqs~ɕinuw ħjaʔ." nanuʔ qu s~ɕawn laluʔ na ʔtajal ħjaʔ ʔtajal ħjaʔ ɣa, pinβʦ~ʨjan laluʔ nqu mtnaq ɣaɣaʔ ru mtnaq la kajʔ kkajal naħaʔ. iniʔ ptnaq ɣaɣaʔ ru iniʔ ptnaq la kajʔ lɣa paris~ɕ naħaʔ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ la. ʔtajal βalaj maħa qu kajʔ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa, s~ɕpzjaŋ βalaj βaq mqjanux na ʔtajal maħa qu kajʔ nijaʔ βalaj. nanuʔ mβħuzjaw kja qu s~ɕquliq lru, s~ɕij ptβuʦ~ʨiʔ nanak qu ppɣluw krajrjax lɣa, makiʔ lqu pintβʦ~ʨjan laluʔ nqu qutux qutux ɣluw na laħuj na s~ɕquliq la, nanuʔ kaħul s~ɕqu kinkiʔan naħaʔ qu ʔriŋan s~ɕmlaluʔ s~ɕa laluʔ na qutux qutux laħuj na s~ɕquliq la, nanuʔ makiʔ kja lqu s~ɕawn maħaʔ ʔtajal, ru βajβuzjuq, tu βunun, ru ʦ~ʨow, ru s~ɕaw, ru rukaj, ru paiwan, ru taʔuʔ, ru amis~ɕ qani la. kaħul taʔ inuʔ mus~ɕaʔ βaqun βalaj mitaʔ qu kin-iniʔ ptnaq na s~ɕquliq s~ɕqu ʔtajal qanij? ktan s~ɕuʔ kja qu s~ɕquliq pʔaɣal ʔinaʔ ɣa, mutuw naħaʔ pqutan maħa "kaħul inuʔ qu inaʔ s~ɕuʔ? ʔtajal iniʔ ɣa plmukan? iniʔ ɣa βunun?", uŋat ana qutux mutuw maqut maħa "plmukan iniʔ ɣa s~ɕquliq? ħjaʔ kij!", nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu βaqun s~ɕqani maħa laluʔ na ʔtajal ħjaʔ ɣa laluʔ na pinβʦ~ʨjan na qutux quutx luħiŋ ɣluw na s~ɕquliq qas~ɕa ħjaʔ. ʔtajal ħjaʔ ɣa laluʔ na kraħuʔ s~ɕqu βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan na s~ɕquliq qas~ɕa ħjaʔ. ħms~ɕwaʔ qu pins~ɕʔulaħ nqu ɣluw na ʔtajal s~ɕqu ɣluw na s~ɕziq qanij kaħul s~ɕa ɣaɣaʔ naħaʔ ru kajʔ naħaʔ mitaʔ ɣa, ʔtajal s~ɕqu s~ɕeziq qanij mitaʔ ɣa, nanuʔ qu s~ɕʔuʦ~ʨij naħa muʦ~ʨi qanij ɣa, minqutux kwara maħa qu qnβaq kwaraʔ nqu ʔtajal kila s~ɕziq qani ħja, kkajal qani uzi ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕraral naʔ ɣa, mtnaq kwaraʔ knitaʔ naħaʔ qani ħijaʔ. ariŋ knakiʔ s~ɕqani na ɣipun naʔ ɣa, jalaw ɣi s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ βaqun maħa kja qu s~ɕquliq na ptas~ɕan rqjas~ɕ ɣa nanuʔ jaqu ʔtajal kja pjas~ɕan ħa, nanuʔ s~ɕkaħul naħaʔ s~ɕqu kajʔ naħaʔ nanak maħa s~ɕami ħjaʔ ɣa ʔtajal s~ɕami maħa ru, nanuʔ ariŋ kja qu kja lqu laluʔ na ʔtajal ka ptas~ɕan rqjas~ɕ qanij la. nanuʔ jas~ɕa lruw mzjup kja s~ɕa ks~ɕkaʔ βalaj na taiwan qu ɣipun lɣa, ktan naħaʔ kja maħa kja uzi qu ɣluw na s~ɕeʔe*iq la, ɣa akiʔ makiʔ qu s~ɕawn βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan na ɣluw s~ɕquliq makiʔ taiwan ru s~ɕpɣluw naħaʔ s~ɕa tajal zoku qu laluʔ na s~ɕeʔe*iq la, ɣa nanuʔ qu ʔtajal βalaj ħjaʔ lɣa, taijal jazoku s~ɕawn miruʔ na ɣakus~ɕjaʔ mis~ɕu qani ħjaʔ. s~ɕpzjaŋ ħŋzjaŋan laluʔ na ʔtajalzoku miruʔ qu ɣipun qanij ɣa, βalaj ɣa ʔtajal maħa qu kajʔ ɣa, s~ɕβaħun naħaʔ maħa ataijaruʔ miru, ɣa s~ɕeʔe*iq ħjaʔ lɣa s~ɕetakaʔ s~ɕawn naħaʔ miruʔ la, βalaj ɣa ʔtajal ɣa *-ta-jal maħa qu βalaj, ru s~ɕeʔe*iq ħijaʔ lɣa s~ɕ*-e-*iq maħa qu βalaj na ħŋzjaŋ naħaʔ ħijaʔ, mwaħ s~ɕqu tħajluw qanij lɣa, tai-ja-ʦ~ʨuʔ s~ɕawn naħaʔ miruʔ qu ʔtajal ħjaʔ ru s~ɕai-t*-k* s~ɕawn naħaʔ miruʔ qu s~ɕeʔe*iq ħjaʔ la. kaħul inuʔ qu s~ɕinllwan maħa "zoku" qanij βalaj ɣa laluʔ na s~ɕawn maħa "zoku" qani ɣa, ana maħa ʔtajal iniʔ ɣa s~ɕeʔe*iq qani ɣaijat mnakiʔ qu kkajal qanij ħjaʔ. nanuʔ jaqu akiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕrʔtun kwaraʔ qu ulaħ na ʔtajal qani ru s~ɕkβalaj naħaʔ s~ɕa βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan na laluʔ na qitix ɣluw, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu s~ɕikij ps~ɕuluŋ s~ɕa βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan nqu maħa maħa nanuʔ qu pinʦ~ʨɣwiʔan na qutux ɣluw na βunmes~ɕjakaj, kwaraʔ qu s~ɕawn maħa uβuj na βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan qanij ɣa s~ɕikij kja laluʔ kwaraʔ qutux qutux pintβʦ~ʨjan, nanuʔ janij qu s~ɕinllwan naħaʔ laluʔ na "zoku" qanij. ij s~ɕkajal taʔ kajʔ na ʔtajal ɣa mus~ɕaʔ jaquw s~ɕawn maħa "ulaħ na laluʔ βinkɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan" maħa qu imiʔ nijaʔ, ɣa βali mutuw s~ɕkajal krajrjax qu kajʔ qnaij ħjaʔ, jalaw ɣi βinkɣan na oinβʦ~ʨjan qanij ħjaʔ ɣa kaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕinllwan na βunmes~ɕjakaj qu laluʔ qanij ħjaʔ, s~ɕaw s~ɕuʔ ijal qu laluʔ na "jazuʔ" uzi ɣa s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕqu maħa mtnaq s~ɕa puqin laluʔ qu ulaħ nijaʔ ka mtnaq laluʔ nas~ɕa lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕjan naħaʔ maħa "jazuʔ" qani la. ɣa βali taʔ iniʔ βaqij kwaraʔ maħa ijat mnakiʔ trajrjax s~ɕraral qu s~ɕinllwan qani ħja. s~ɕawn taʔ nanuʔ ħmkaŋiʔ qu laluʔ s~ɕraral na ɣluw nqu ptas~ɕan rqjas~ɕ qanij s~ɕkaħul taʔs~ɕqu s~ɕinllwan nanak na ʔʔtajal qu s~ɕawn maħa s~ɕquliq qani ħjaʔ ɣa, βalaj βalaj ħjaʔ qu s~ɕawn na ɣluw ʔtajal maħa s~ɕquliq" s~ɕqu s~ɕawn na ɣluw na s~ɕʔziq maħa "s~ɕeʔe*iq" iniʔ ɣa s~ɕawn naħaʔ "s~ɕziq" ɣa mtnaq kwaraʔmaħa jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn taʔ pinβʦ~ʨjan taʔ s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq minqjanux ʦ~ʨinβwanan qanij. ɣaɣaʔ ħjaʔ lɣa mtnaq qutux laluʔ na βinkaɣan pinβʦ~ʨjan kwara qanij ħjaʔ. jalaw ɣi βali mnakiʔ βiruʔ naħaʔ miruʔ s~ɕraral rwa! mus~ɕaʔ nanak jaqu s~ɕkaħul s~ɕa mtnaq ɣaɣaʔ naħaʔ ru jaqu mus~ɕaʔ ʔllaw ijal βaqun mitaʔ s~ɕa rqjas~ɕ ru inrkjas~ɕan naħaʔ, awʔru kkajal s~ɕa kajʔ naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋiʔ s~ɕqu s~ɕis~ɕaj pins~ɕqtuxan na laluʔ naħaʔ s~ɕraral la, nanuʔ s~ɕkaħul s~ɕa wajal s~ɕkal qani ps~ɕpuŋ lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ nanak jaqu maħa "ptas~ɕan zoku" qu mus~ɕaʔ mʔuluw kja qu laluʔ naħaʔ la. pins~ɕlaβaŋ mqjanux na ɣluw na ptas~ɕan ariŋ s~ɕa minqutux s~ɕraral (ptas~ɕan***ptas~ɕan*****) pins~ɕlaβaŋ kaħul na ptas~ɕan s~ɕraral ħjaʔ ɣa ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕuŋus~ɕ na mβħuzjaw qu s~ɕquliq nijaʔ ru ms~ɕɣaɣaj ms~ɕħziʔ taj ββzinaħ na rħzjal, kaħul s~ɕqu ms~ɕħziʔ lru mʔs~ɕaziŋ na ulaħ ka ɣluw na ʔtajal s~ɕqu ɣluw na s~ɕziq qanij la. βaβaw nijaʔ lawzi lɣa, nanuʔ qu s~ɕaziŋ ulan nqu ptas~ɕan ka ʔtajalru s~ɕziq qanij ɣa, njux mtβuʦ~ʨiʔ ms~ɕinna ʦ~ʨjuɣal uzij qu ulaħ naħaʔ nanak uzij la. ru taqu ɣluw na ʔtajal ħjaʔ lɣa, ms~ɕlaβaŋ mqjanux lawzij lru njux ms~ɕinʦ~ʨjuɣal uzij qu pinβʦ~ʨjan na kkajal kajʔ naħaʔ mis~ɕuw qanij la, nanuʔ ɣluw na mkmujaw, ru ɣluw na mes~ɕaliʔ, ru ɣluw na kinħakulʦ~ʨjuɣal iniʔ ptnaq uβuj na kkajal kajʔ qanij. nanuʔ qu ulaħ na s~ɕziq uzij ɣa, ms~ɕlaβaŋ mqjanux uzij lru njux ms~ɕinʦ~ʨjuɣal uzij qu pinβʦ~ʨjan na kkajal kajʔ naħaʔ mis~ɕuw qanij uzij la, nanuʔ jaqu ɣluw na trukuʔ, ru ɣluw na tow*aʔ, ru jaqu ɣluw na tk*ajaʔ ʦ~ʨjuɣal iniʔ ptnaq pinβʦ~ʨjan kkajal na kajʔ naħaʔ qanij. jalaw ɣi wajal s~ɕwalan na s~ɕexuʔ ulaħ na s~ɕziq maħaʔ ptβuʦ~ʨiʔ nanak mɣ qutux nanak na zokuʔ lruw, ijat pkakiʔ s~ɕqu mus~ɕaʔ makuʔ pŋajɣaj pinqzjuʔ βaβaw nijaʔ qu ulaħ naħaʔ ħjaʔ la.
